title: (Bare Bones X Create) Bare Metals
description: Retextures the Create mod to better fit in with the Bare Bones resource pack, replicating the style of the trailers.
body: ### For other Create addons, click here: [](https://modrinth.com/collection/GEcFHDu3) # Simplify the machines in your world. **Retextures the 'Create' mod to better fit in with the 'Bare Bones' resource pack, bringing the textures to its bare metals.** ---------------- ### Now with support for Crafts & Additions! ![All the Ingots in Bare Metals ](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/rdaRcO5E/images/209aa6849edc6b21227913a3d40fed2ff7478ea2.png) Compatibility -------------- Any file should work for any Minecraft version. I've put multiple versions anyway so Minecraft won't give the "This is made for a newer/older version of Minecraft" message. Instructions and Links -------------- Intended for use with the 'Bare Bones' resource pack and 'Create' mod, both made by amazing people. [Want the CurseForge link?](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bare-bones-x-create-bare-metals) (We earn more revenue on Modrinth though so please stay here) Have you ever thought about having the new Bedrock UI in Java, but prefer using Dark Mode? Introducing [Ore UI, As Unintended!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/javabed-ui). For other mods with Bare Bones, check out [Specimen's Bare Bones Modded Compat](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-modded-compat). Contact -------------- If you want to contact me, I'll be on the Bare Bones discord server. Username: OneGunBullet
